message: Node started: Conduct a deep dive into theoretical physics literature (arXiv, journals) to investigate the claim 'beta < 1/6' in lattice Yang-Mills theory. Specifically: 1. Look for a 'B^2 formula' related to the mass gap. 2. Verify the validity of the 'beta < 1/6' threshold. 3. Define 'irreparable gap' in this context. 4. Identify the correct mathematical approach/threshold for the mass gap problem in lattice gauge theory. Provide a technical summary of findings.
